/assets/characters/miscellaneous/miscell.description: A tan and teal twin-boom space fighter with four rear engines, forward cannons, angular wings, and worn gold trim.
A whimsical round wooden walking house with bird-like legs, leafy trees growing from the roof, porthole windows, lanterns, and a smoking chimney.
A friendly macaw pilot sitting inside a round glass capsule with small side engines, orange pads, teal glass, and a trailing scarf.
A tall white windmill tower house with a teal roof, wooden lookout balcony, small doorway, nearby trees, and warm storybook details.
A small round cottage on a floating grassy island with a teal roof, trees, a hanging ladder, wooden railings, and dangling stone roots.
A compact domed round hut with teal circular windows, a yellow awning, potted plants, stone steps, and a small propeller on top.
A low hobbit-style hill house with a grassy roof, round teal door, stone chimney, large tree, curved path, and potted shrubs.
A raised treehouse built into a large tree trunk with a round teal window, wooden stairs, balcony railings, teal canopy, and hanging lantern.
A conical straw-roof hut with a round teal door, small flag, garden bushes, potted plants, and a cozy handmade look.
A sleek white and gold rocket-like spacecraft with a large turquoise cockpit, swept wings, side engines, and a brown scarf banner.
A chunky rounded capsule spacecraft with a large blue circular front window, cream hull panels, brown trim, and twin side thrusters.
A narrow white and teal racing spacecraft with long wings, pointed nose, rear engine pods, brown paneling, and gold accent markings.
A manta-shaped white spacecraft with broad curved wings, a blue cockpit canopy, small flags, brown trim, and rear engine pods.
A ring-shaped spacecraft with a small central cockpit pod, teal glass, side fins, and engine modules around a circular cream frame.
A small pirate-style flying ship with a brown skull sail, wooden hull, teal windows, lanterns, ropes, and tiny flags.
A boxy tan-and-teal cargo spaceship with exposed engine pods, squared front cabin, brown straps, and rugged mechanical panels.
A round teal and gold airship gondola with large windows, a roof telescope, side engines, hanging ornaments, and small flags.
A crescent moon hover car with a teal cockpit, orange nose engine, small wheels, side thrusters, and a curved cream shell.
A beetle-shaped walking rover with a large teal dome shell, cream body, orange lights, small legs, and a glass cockpit.
A bell-shaped flying pod with teal windows, orange landing feet, a tiny roof flag, and a round rear engine.
A compact cream spaceship pod with teal glass windows, twin rear engines, round side ports, and orange metal trim.
A small dart-shaped rocket plane with a teal cockpit, orange flame tail, teal fins, and a pointed cream nose.
A turtle-shaped rover with a teal segmented shell, glass cockpit, small legs, side fins, and a rear engine.
A whimsical wooden sailboat with teal sails, orange flags, round portholes, dangling lanterns, and storybook rigging.
A small pagoda-style hut with a teal curved roof, round door, warm hanging lanterns, stone steps, and garden plants.
A round tower cottage on a grassy mound with teal roof, wooden door, stone stairs, little flags, and small garden paths.
A hobbit-style hill house with a round teal door, grassy roof, flowers, trees, round windows, and a small chimney.
A teapot-shaped cottage with teal roof and door, round window, handle, spout, tiny garden, and cozy storybook details.
A seashell-shaped beach cottage with a round teal door, small awning, sandy stones, coral, and a spiral shell roof.
A cliffside village house with stacked teal roofs, stone stairs, balconies, little trees, and a high rocky base.
A canal-side wooden cottage with teal roof, orange awning, dock, rowboat, lanterns, barrels, and round windows.
A rocket-shaped tower house with teal round windows, orange fins, tiny chimney, garden pots, and a small attached porch.
A small shrine-like cottage with a teal tiled roof, orange awning, stone steps, lantern, and a cozy garden base.
A glowing lantern-shaped flying craft with teal roof, orange lamp body, small side engines, dangling tassel, and warm light.
A manta ray spaceship with a teal cockpit, cream wings, teal patches, orange trim, and a streamlined storybook shape.
A snail-shaped car with a spiral shell cabin, teal cockpit, small wheels, orange trim, and a tiny flag.
A tree-root house with teal tiled roof, round window, hanging lantern, plants, wood planks, and a small staircase.
